_schema.description: Renmito enhancement log. Every user-requested change is recorded here.

fields.title: Short human-readable title
fields.breaking: [future] Whether this is a breaking change

enhancements.title: Log list under timeline with focus navigation
enhancements.description: Added a scrollable log list section below the timeline showing all entries for the selected day. Clicking any row highlights the corresponding bar in the timeline and smoothly scrolls it into view. Includes shimmer skeleton loader and empty state.

enhancements.title: Dark / Light mode toggle
enhancements.description: Added a sun/moon icon toggle in the top header to switch between dark and light themes. Theme preference is persisted in localStorage and restored on next visit. Light theme uses a clean white/grey palette.

enhancements.title: Left side navigation menu with Logger section
enhancements.description: Restructured the entire app shell to include a 210px left navigation panel. Added a 'Logger' nav item containing the calendar, timeline, and log list. The nav collapses to icon-only on narrow screens. Designed to support additional sections in the future.

enhancements.title: Double timeline view height
enhancements.description: Increased the Gantt timeline track height from 90px to 200px. Added min-height: calc(50vh - 80px) to the timeline container so it always occupies at least half the viewport. Log bars, drag overlays, and quarter-lines scale automatically.

enhancements.title: Deferred log form — open only on Create Log click
enhancements.description: Previously the create-log form opened immediately after a drag selection. Now it only opens when the user explicitly clicks the 'Create Log' button in the selection bar. Introduced a separate createLogClicked output event on TimelineComponent.

enhancements.title: CSV report download for selected day
enhancements.description: Added a 'Download report of the Day' card below the calendar. Clicking 'Download CSV' generates and downloads a CSV file (renmito-YYYY-MM-DD.csv) with columns: Date, Start Time, End Time, Duration, Activity Type, Label. Button is disabled when no logs exist. Generated entirely in the browser — no server round-trip.
enhancements.notes: Future: support PDF and XLSX export formats.

enhancements.title: Rename app from TimeLogger to Renmito
enhancements.description: Updated the app name in the header logo, browser tab title (<title>), and all relevant references from 'TimeLogger' to 'Renmito'.

enhancements.title: Enhancement log file + notepad drawer UI
enhancements.description: Created enhancements.json in src/assets to track all requested changes with version, type, date, description, tags and future-ready fields. Added a notepad icon in the header; clicking it opens a right-side slide-in drawer that loads and displays all enhancements from the file.
enhancements.notes: Future fields available in _schema: priority, requestedBy, breaking, timeSpentMins, pullRequest, branch, screenshot, changelog.

enhancements.title: Timeline hover time indicator + drag live end-time pill
enhancements.description: When hovering over the timeline (idle), a dashed vertical line and a time pill appear at the cursor showing the exact time at minute precision. During drag, a start-time anchor pill appears at the drag origin and a live blue end-time pill follows the cursor showing the current drag end time in real time. Both pills flip direction at the right edge to avoid overflow.

enhancements.title: Brand colour theme — orange header, navy nav, BFC9D1 sections
enhancements.description: Applied a new brand colour palette: top nav bar #E76F2E (orange), left side menu #25343F (dark navy), section backgrounds #BFC9D1, timeline default slot selection #BFC9D1, timeline background #25343F. Dark mode uses harmonious darker complements: header stays orange, nav #1A272F, sections #1E2E38, timeline #1A272F. Introduced --header-bg, --header-text, --header-icon-bg, --nav-text, --nav-text-muted, --timeline-text, --timeline-text-muted CSS variables to ensure correct contrast on always-dark nav and timeline regardless of theme.

enhancements.title: Log form activity chips + dropdown + custom type
enhancements.description: Redesigned the 'New Log Entry' form activity selector. Five common types (Work Log, Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Transit) are shown as quick-select chips with colour coding. Less-frequent types (Sleep, Exercise, Entertainment) appear in a dropdown. A '✏️ Custom' dropdown option reveals a free-text input so users can define any activity name. Edit mode correctly restores chip/dropdown/custom state. Legacy types retained in constants for backward compatibility.

enhancements.title: New brand colour palette — navy header, amber nav, cream sections, red timeline
enhancements.description: Applied a new colour palette: header #003049 (dark navy), left nav #fcbf49 (amber/yellow — requires dark nav text, a flip from previous always-light-on-dark-nav approach), section backgrounds #eae2b7 (warm cream), drag-selection overlay based on #f77f00 (orange), timeline background #d62828 (red). Dark mode uses harmonious darker complements: header #001F30, nav #C49030, surfaces #1E1C0E, timeline #8B1414. Updated --nav-text and --nav-text-muted to dark values for both themes since the nav is now a light amber surface. Fixed hardcoded #E76F2E and #ffffff nav colours in app.component.ts to use CSS variables.
enhancements.notes: Nav text is now dark (#1A1808 light / #1A1205 dark) because the amber nav background requires it for contrast. This inverts the previous always-dark-nav pattern from 1.10.

enhancements.title: Colour palette — charcoal header, steel-blue nav, white sections, coral timeline
enhancements.description: Applied a new colour palette: header #2b2d42 (dark charcoal), left nav #8d99ae (steel blue — medium luminance requires dark nav text), section backgrounds #FFFFFF (pure white), drag-selection overlay #e94f37 (coral red), timeline background #2b2d42 (same charcoal as header). Dark mode complements: header #1A1B28, nav #4A5568 (darker steel blue — now needs light text, flip from light mode), surfaces #1C1E30, timeline #1A1B28. Active nav accent is coral #e94f37 in dark mode and charcoal #2b2d42 in light mode. All nav text and active/hover colours are CSS-variable-driven for automatic adaptation.
enhancements.notes: Nav text direction flips between themes: light mode nav #8d99ae (medium) needs dark text #1A1C2A; dark mode nav #4A5568 (dark) needs light text #D0D8E8.
